text:
HOW DOES MTD ACTUALLY WORK? 📊

A lot of people are confused about what Making Tax Digital actually requires. Here's the simple version:

📅 QUARTERLY UPDATES (4 per year)
You submit a summary of your income and expenses every 3 months. HMRC gets regular visibility of your finances instead of one annual snapshot.

📋 FINAL DECLARATION (1 per year)
At year-end, you confirm your totals and claim any allowances. This replaces your traditional self-assessment return.

🖥️ HMRC-APPROVED SOFTWARE REQUIRED
This has to be done digitally — no paper, no manual spreadsheets.

Sounds like a lot? With Genius Tax, you just share your records each quarter and we handle the rest. HMRC Authorised. Sage-powered.

💰 £49/month early bird (was £79). 6 days left.
